text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw | 97% | stars now 18892 → est 34115 (range 34037-34193)
   https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
2) cloudflare/vinext | 95% | stars now 1554 → est 14538 (range 14513-14563)
   https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext
3) HKUDS/ClawWork | 95% | stars now 5485 → est 10918 (range 10881-10955)
   https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawWork
4) nicobailon/visual-explainer | 93% | stars now 2921 → est 6171 (range 6146-6196)
   https://github.com/nicobailon/visual-explainer
5) AlexsJones/llmfit | 93% | stars now 4384 → est 8681 (range 8641-8721)
   https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
